# Ashish Sinha — Enterprise AI Product Leader

> Portfolio of a senior AI product leader focused on shipping enterprise AI from prototype to production — execution dashboard, operating manual, architecture vault, experience timeline, and writing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Full portfolio with execution dashboard, expertise, operating instinct, manual, architecture vault, experience, skills, writing, and contact.
- [The 80/40 Rule](/writing/80-40-rule): Article on why high-signal imperfection beats slow enterprise roadmaps.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public routes.
- [robots.txt](/robots.txt): Crawler rules and sitemap reference.
